text: Created ticket Refactor worker messages into a durable inbox protocol

Implemented a durable inbox protocol in `pi-workers`: message records now carry explicit awaiting/lifecycle metadata, unresolved inbox backlog is queryable directly, worker read/dashboard surfaces expose inbox state, and worker command/tool surfaces can inspect and acknowledge/resolve actionable messages. Verified with targeted worker tests, `npm run typecheck`, and `npx biome check packages/pi-workers`.
